source.name: VDrift data repository
notes: VDrift code repository documents the project as GPL-3.0.
The data repository is hosted separately on SourceForge SVN.
Cars are stored in VDrift JOE mesh format with PNG textures and .car config files.

selectionGoal: Find a fictional coupe proxy with stable body/glass/interior/wheel/light separation for the Apex Seoul retro sprite pipeline.

fictionalPreset.intendedUse: fictional coupe proxy; do not ship with original brand/model naming
fictionalPreset.blockedBy: JOE-to-glTF conversion step is not implemented yet.

candidates.fit: good silhouette, good body/glass/interior separation, wheel mesh comes from shared carparts

parts.tires: generated from tire/touring.png and tire dimensions

candidates.fit: strong sports coupe silhouette, good lights, wheel mesh comes from shared carparts

parts.tires: generated from tire/touring.png and tire dimensions

candidates.fit: excellent local part coverage, but older rally/celica silhouette

candidates.fit: best first choice: modern coupe proportions with local body/glass/interior/wheel/light assets

nextSteps: Download only XG car files and required shared carparts into a clearly licensed source/vendor area.
Implement or add a JOE-to-glTF conversion step before touching real-vehicle-poc.json.
Create a GLB with separate materials named body, glass, interior, wheel, tire, brake_light, reverse_light.
Add raven-xg-coupe-poc to real-vehicle-poc.json only after the converted GLB exists.
Render a 256px pose sheet, then run pixel-pass and ComfyUI retro filter.
